textByHash.7995f31f5433ae2c05250283638b4e7170d5ac4e: How am I supposed to get past this?
textByHash.f9c0f8ca7a7bc12e39fdd43d77f2c182d57e79f7: Hopefully I'll make it out of Darkmeyer one day.
textByHash.8f1f05992fb99f213488a0417a924830c338be79: Phew, I made it! Time for a break.
textByHash.4d7781e44306ffac9aa603f6cc0e9b8658a68073: Thank Saradomin that mysterious stranger gave me this ring or I'd be toast!
textByHash.5366acf9448098f2aeb2e56c586924d4fa569ed4: That trap was harder than I thought! Perhaps I'm not cut out for this.
textByHash.35d439037650f557436185c34ee5eda9d1f54aee: C'mon, why won't this thing open?
textByHash.1ba7b356be1b382c2103a2ee19a411a30ccdef23: It's okay, I think I've got it... Agh, I thought I had it that time!
textByHash.6e3dee2222907908680452a8a71849db520a0e25: I need to bring that mysterious stranger 100 Hallowed marks so that he can help me escape Darkmeyer.
textByHash.7e79617cb9dc3ca2c8412d1c6057294eca27c93d: That's okay. I'm sure I'll get this open eventually.
textByHash.f8c91ee55c94c7926a32befc6d69bdfaf65d798b: Wow! You'd do that for me?
textByHash.3c528b102d8508788b7934780f563571bb0033e4: Oh... You didn't have to tease me like that.
textByHash.e81c15fb67180be751c980c42a73b6d70e46899c: I can't thank you enough! I can finally buy my freedom!
textByHash.946db83f3666faaf62f49ea11cec930b59a9d83e: I think you have me mistaken for someone else.
textByHash.d9e366525caf9c009b4870c9d68627e080308634: Now go away. I can't hear the locking mechanism with you breathing in my ear!
textByHash.417404c75de7567da6edc55211ff1c13459f63b4: Agh, thought I had it that time!
